title: rubus irritans var. subinermis
intro: Rubus irritans var. subinermis, also known as the bramble or blackberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to various parts of the world. The medicinal properties of Rubus irritans var. subinermis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Rubus irritans var. subinermis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
